response.original_title: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be
response.overview: Rick's groups Comes face to face with the cruel leader, Negan, cause of Rick's actions, Negan does something the group will Never forget.
response.tagline: Bet ya thought you were all going to grow old together, sitting around the table at Sunday dinner in the happily ever after. No... doesn't work like that Rick. Not anymore.
response.title: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be
